keyEvents.text: Armando Lashley (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Junior Arteaga (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Barbados 0, Nicaragua 1. Junior Arteaga (Nicaragua) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Barbados 0, Nicaragua 2. Nextaly Rodríguez (Nicaragua) right footed shot from a difficult angle and long range on the right to the top left corner. Assisted by Luis Coronel.
Substitution, Barbados. Nadre Butcher replaces Omani Leacock.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Jaime Moreno replaces Abner Acuña.
Goal!  Barbados 0, Nicaragua 3. Luis Coronel (Nicaragua) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Henry Niño with a through ball.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Jeffrey Chávez replaces Luis Coronel.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Widman Talavera replaces Junior Arteaga.
Goal!  Barbados 0, Nicaragua 4. Jacob Montes (Nicaragua) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jeffrey Chávez.
Substitution, Barbados. Keon Atkins replaces Rashad Jules.
Substitution, Barbados. Ackeel Applewhaite replaces Rashad Smith because of an injury.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Jonathan Moncada replaces Jacob Montes.
Substitution, Barbados. Tajio James replaces Armando Lashley.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Melvin Hernández replaces Marvin Fletes.
Ackeel Applewhaite (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Keon Atkins (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

First Half begins.
Hand ball by Armando Lashley (Barbados).
